subject: [RFC PATCH 5/9 v2] mm/memcontrol: Set toptier limits proportional to memory limits

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch updates the Linux kernel to set tiered limits proportional to memory limits when users write to memory limit sysfs files or when memory hotplug occurs. It introduces new read-only cgroup files to expose these derived limits, including `memory.toptier_{min,low,high,max}`. The changes are made in three files: `include/linux/memcontrol.h`, `mm/memcontrol.c`, and `mm/memory-tiers.c`. The patch aims to improve the dynamic adjustment of tiered memory limits based on system memory availability.
